  Fix 1: "Disable classSelfMismatch for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace 'MyService | OtherService' with 'MyService'"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable classSelfMismatch for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable classSelfMismatch for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace 'MyService | OtherService' with 'MyService'" ===

--- file:///.src/classSelfMismatch_unionGiven.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Context from "effect/Context"

interface ServiceShape {
  value: number
}

export class OtherService extends Context.Tag("OtherService")<OtherService, {}>() {}

export class MyService extends Context.Tag("MyService")<MyService, ServiceShape>() {}
